It aimed to uncover hidden trends and has prompted a development from a model-driven perspective to a data-driven approach. Among numerous properties of Big Data, datasets of Big Data are identified primary as 3Vs attributes which have high variety, velocity and volume. These provide an invaluable insight and assist in making precise decisions. Analyzing this information and outlining the outcome into helpful data is the method for extricating an incentive from these enormous volumes of datasets.
